text: (continued from previous) Okay, THE SITE HAS NOT FAILED. text: (continued from previous)If you are going to say that you are stating actual facts, then tell us your sources.While it's debatable over whether or not Doug makes a lot of mistakes in his reviews, he always corrects them in a series of correction videos.
